deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. $199K purchase, $65K rehab, $340K ARV. Projected profit $42K-$62K. Close date May 1, 2026. Comps pulled: 31. Avg sale $207K. Est value $266K.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed data to Sirhc. Lock template for CMA tool.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Listing expired March 2026. Isaac Linares development interest stalled. Sisters expressed desire to end listing. Signs picked up May 2026. No path forward identified.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away. Signs picked up last week.
Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Discussed Isaac Linares development concept (~$150K offer).

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back into property. Plan to make updates and repairs, relist later. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Underwater by $93K-$143K.
deals.next: Archive file. Confirm signed termination release received.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan to relist after updates.
Call completed. Chandler laid off. Short sale path preferred by sellers.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Out of Corpus Christi deal. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K via Isaac Linares. FHA 203k financing angle. Two structures on property. Decision made - too much for them. Still actively searching.
deals.next: Revisit new construction search if Saxet falls through. Confirm pre-approval status with Zach.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K (Feb 2026). CMA pulled. Recommended list price $295K. Divorce situation. Colton looking for contractor work.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Schedule professional photos. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled. Net sheet built.
Prior clients. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Listed May 14 at $259,900. Relocating to NC, June deadline. Multiple showings. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Potential hairline foundation crack. Roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm showing time May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Multiple interested buyers. Second-look buyers favorite. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing May 30.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Canvassed neighborhood.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash transaction $152K. Buyer: military. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Post-close follow-up with Joyce.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Confirmed complete May 9.
Fernando signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank FSB foreclosure. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Drywall done. Paint finishing up.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Installed 3 cameras. Electricians reconnected pole to meter. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days.
Work officially started. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer's agent Javier. Waiting on both.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not received. Backup offer interest noted.
Clearing complete. Photos being posted to social media.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement income. Paying $1700/mo rent. Daughters live with her - disability income. Between jobs. Fixing credit. VA loan eligible, zero down. Sick grandkid as of Apr 29 call.
leads.next: Call or text today May 14. Keep it light. Check in on grandkid first. Do not let this slip.

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Overdue since Apr 30. Hot lead - VA buyer, $1700/mo rent, motivated.
Spoke with Pamela. Sick grandkid. Following up Apr 30.
Confirmed military retirement. Daughters as co-borrowers. Follow-up text sent.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration if permission granted. Real estate potential long-term trust-based.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story content. Keep nurturing, no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Connected through garden share group. Permission needed for content story.

leads.title: Isaac Investor
leads.detail: Investor met in person. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area interest. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold). Add to Bold Trail.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. No further details on file.

leads.title: Miss Pat - Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned the neighbor behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Community connection through Miss Pat is the warm intro.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out with garden angle first, realtor second.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned situation. Son is new owner. Deceased was avid gardener.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751 job site. Wife is active military. Looking to purchase.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner - downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and fixer property needed. Understand financing and scope.

logs.m: Jerome caught up. Has buyer needing fixer property. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Chris helped Brandon get into real estate. Two opportunities: 8527 Green Bliss rental (uncle Jimbo) and Milagros Stringer (his mom) new construction buyer in Grace Gardens.
leads.next: Follow up on Milagros buyer rep status. Get her signed. Coordinate builder visit with mom and Brandon.

logs.m: Reached out to builders. Working rate buydown scenarios for payment optimization.
Buyer rep agreement sent to Milagros.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran mother. New construction buyer. $50K down, target $1000/month payment. Grace Gardens, Lennar, DR Horton, MI Homes options. Rate buydowns key angle. Not locked to any builder.
leads.next: Follow up on buyer rep signature. Confirm Milagros signed. Coordinate builder visit. Register as buyer agent on first visit.

logs.m: Buyer rep not yet signed. Following up to prioritize.
Buyer rep packet sent.

priorities.title: Call Pamela Moore
priorities.notes: Military retirement + disability income. Paying $1700/mo rent. Overdue since Apr 30. Do not let this slip. Call today May 14.

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Utilities
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected. Water meter pending 1-2 days. Need to call both utilities to confirm status. Flooring starts this week.

followUps.text: Replace camera batteries on next site visit

priorities.title: Mill Path - Showing Confirmation
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers rescheduled to May 30. Confirm time with agent. They are the hottest lead - property is their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered.

followUps.text: Follow up with second-look buyers agent after showing
